hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // "알 수 없음"'); DETAIL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // .tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""' | head -c 120); TIME=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "{\"text\": \":warning: *Claude 권한 요청* | $TIME\\n도구: $TOOL\\n내용: $DETAIL\"}" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"

INPUT=$(cat); NOTIF=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.params.message // "확인이 필요합니다"'); TIME=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "{\"text\": \":bell: *Claude 알림* | $TIME\\n$NOTIF\"}" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"

PROMPT=$(cat /tmp/claude_last_prompt.txt 2>/dev/null || echo '작업 완료'); TIME=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "{\"text\": \":white_check_mark: *Claude 작업 완료* | $TIME\\n$PROMPT\"}" "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"
